news.paragraph: Equity markets are facing downward pressure as rising oil prices and accelerating inflation weigh on stock performance. Traders should be particularly mindful of the upcoming consumer inflation report, which is acting as a significant catalyst for recent declines in equity futures.
headlines: Texas accuses Netflix of spying on children in new lawsuit
Stocks Retreat as Oil Prices Surge and Inflation Accelerates
Exchange-Traded Funds, Equity Futures Fall Pre-Bell Tuesday Amid Consumer Inflation Report Release

Netflix fires back at Texas over lawsuit accusing it of spying on kids
